contentBlocks.original:
ॐ राजाधि राजाय प्रसह्य साहिने नमो वयं वैश्रवणाय कूर्महे
समे कामान् काम कामाय मा कामेश्वरो वैश्रवणो दधातु
कुबेराय वैश्रवणाय महाराजाय नमः
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ rājādhi rājāya prasahya sāhine namo vayaṃ vaiśravaṇāya kūrmahe
same kāmān kāma kāmāya mā kāmeśvaro vaiśravaṇo dadhātu
kuberāya vaiśravaṇāya mahārājāya namaḥ
contentBlocks.translation: Om. We offer our salutations unto the Lord, the king of kings, the satisfier of desires. May the Lord of desires give me, the seeker of desires, what I desire. Salutations unto the Lord, the great king, the Lord of wealth.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – Om; राजाधि (rājādhi) – king of kings (rāja:king | adhi:above); राजाय (rājāya) – to the king; प्रसह्य (prasahya) – satisfier; साहिने (sāhine) – to the powerful; नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; वयं (vayaṃ) – we; वैश्रवणाय (vaiśravaṇāya) – to Vaiśravaṇa; कूर्महे (kūrmahe) – we offer; समे (same) – together; कामान् (kāmān) – desires; काम (kāma) – desire; कामाय (kāmāya) – to the seeker of desires; मा (mā) – me; कामेश्वरः (kāmeśvaraḥ) – Lord of desires (kāma:desire | īśvara:Lord); वैश्रवणः (vaiśravaṇaḥ) – Vaiśravaṇa; दधातु (dadhātu) – may give; कुबेराय (kuberāya) – to Kubera; वैश्रवणाय (vaiśravaṇāya) – to Vaiśravaṇa; महाराजाय (mahārājāya) – to the great king (mahā:great | rājāya:to the king); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations;
